~ home posts/ notes/ projects/ about.md uses.md +
guest@berryhill : ~ $cd posts/ && ls -la --sort=date

posts/archive

Long-form notes on agentic-first development, AI / ML systems, blockchain rails, crypto market structure, digital music, and the small frictions that change when intelligent automation moves into the loop. Written slowly. $ grep -r "shift" ./

~/posts $ ↵ to apply · esc to clear

cat pinned.md

2 starred · author's pick
.md★22 min · 2026-05-12
the-agentic-first-development-thesis.md
If the next decade of software is mostly written by agents, the artifact we sit inside has to change. A working sketch of what replaces the IDE — and why the seat at the table moves from typer to operator.
↑ 2,418💬 38updated 2d
.md★9 min · 2026-04-30
rwa-tokenization-2026.md
Past the slide decks, three categories have working volume: T-bills, private credit, and the boring middle of structured products. A field report from the desks that actually touch the rails.
↑ 1,127💬 22updated 6d
